name: hans-peter-ording/espn-api-symfony-bundle
description: Symfony bundle to import data from ESPN api to symfony

suggest.php-http/discovery: Enables zero-config auto-discovery of PSR-18 clients and PSR-17 factories
suggest.symfony/http-client: PSR-18 client and PSR-17 factories in one package, usable via Psr18Client
suggest.nyholm/psr7: Lightweight PSR-17 request/URI factory implementation, commonly paired with Guzzle
